name: Aged Roe
obtainMethod: Process any fish Roe in a Preserves Jar
description: Aged fish eggs with a complex, savory flavor.

name: Artisan Goods
description: Wiki-derived supplemental item entry for Artisan Goods.
obtainMethod: Artisan good listed on the Stardew Valley Wiki.

name: Beer
obtainMethod: Process Wheat in a Keg
description: A classic brew made from wheat. Served at the Stardrop Saloon.

name: Cask Productivity
description: Wiki-derived supplemental item entry for Cask Productivity.
obtainMethod: Artisan good listed on the Stardew Valley Wiki.

name: Caviar
obtainMethod: Process Sturgeon Roe in a Preserves Jar
description: Exquisite aged sturgeon roe. A prized delicacy.

name: Cheese
obtainMethod: Process Milk in a Cheese Press
description: A sharp, flavorful cheese. A staple in many recipes.

name: Cloth
obtainMethod: Process Wool in a Loom
description: A bolt of fine cloth woven from sheep's wool.

name: Coffee
obtainMethod: Process 5 Coffee Beans in a Keg
description: A warm brew that increases movement speed for a short time.

name: Dinosaur Mayonnaise
obtainMethod: Process a Dinosaur Egg in a Mayonnaise Machine
description: An ancient mayonnaise made from a dinosaur egg. Extraordinary!

name: Dried Fruit
description: Wiki-derived supplemental item entry for Dried Fruit.
obtainMethod: Artisan good listed on the Stardew Valley Wiki.

name: Dried Mushrooms
description: Wiki-derived supplemental item entry for Dried Mushrooms.
obtainMethod: Artisan good listed on the Stardew Valley Wiki.

name: Duck Mayonnaise
obtainMethod: Process a Duck Egg in a Mayonnaise Machine
description: A rich, golden mayonnaise made from duck eggs.

name: Goat Cheese
obtainMethod: Process Goat Milk in a Cheese Press
description: A creamy, tart cheese made from goat's milk.

name: Green Tea
obtainMethod: Process Tea Leaves in a Keg
description: A soothing green tea. Provides a small health boost.

name: Honey
obtainMethod: Produced by Bee Houses placed outdoors
description: Sweet honey from a bee house. More valuable if placed near flowers.

name: Jellies and Pickles
description: Wiki-derived supplemental item entry for Jellies and Pickles.
obtainMethod: Artisan good listed on the Stardew Valley Wiki.

name: Jelly
obtainMethod: Process any fruit in a Preserves Jar (value = fruit base price × 2 + 50)
description: A sweet fruit preserve sealed in a jar.

name: Juice
obtainMethod: Process any vegetable in a Keg (value = vegetable base price × 2.25)
description: Freshly pressed vegetable juice.

name: Keg Productivity
description: Wiki-derived supplemental item entry for Keg Productivity.
obtainMethod: Artisan good listed on the Stardew Valley Wiki.

name: Keg Productivity - Artisan
description: Wiki-derived supplemental item entry for Keg Productivity - Artisan.
obtainMethod: Artisan good listed on the Stardew Valley Wiki.

name: Keg Productivity - Tiller
description: Wiki-derived supplemental item entry for Keg Productivity - Tiller.
obtainMethod: Artisan good listed on the Stardew Valley Wiki.

name: Mayonnaise
obtainMethod: Process an Egg in a Mayonnaise Machine
description: It's a high-quality mayonnaise.

name: Mead
obtainMethod: Process Honey in a Keg
description: A sweet alcoholic drink made from fermented honey.

name: Mystic Syrup
description: Wiki-derived supplemental item entry for Mystic Syrup.
obtainMethod: Artisan good listed on the Stardew Valley Wiki.

name: Oil
obtainMethod: Process Sunflower, Corn, or Sunflower Seeds in an Oil Maker
description: A generic cooking oil used in many recipes.

name: Pale Ale
obtainMethod: Process Hops in a Keg
description: A refreshing craft ale brewed from hops.

name: Pickles
obtainMethod: Process any vegetable in a Preserves Jar (value = vegetable base price × 2 + 50)
description: Crunchy pickled vegetables sealed in a jar.

name: Preserves Jar Productivity
description: Wiki-derived supplemental item entry for Preserves Jar Productivity.
obtainMethod: Artisan good listed on the Stardew Valley Wiki.

name: Preserves Jar Productivity - Artisan
description: Wiki-derived supplemental item entry for Preserves Jar Productivity - Artisan.
obtainMethod: Artisan good listed on the Stardew Valley Wiki.

name: Preserves Jar Productivity - Tiller
description: Wiki-derived supplemental item entry for Preserves Jar Productivity - Tiller.
obtainMethod: Artisan good listed on the Stardew Valley Wiki.

name: Raisins
description: Wiki-derived supplemental item entry for Raisins.
obtainMethod: Artisan good listed on the Stardew Valley Wiki.

name: Rice
obtainMethod: Process Unmilled Rice in a Mill, or purchase from Pierre's General Store
description: A staple grain used in many recipes.

name: Smoked Fish
description: Wiki-derived supplemental item entry for Smoked Fish.
obtainMethod: Artisan good listed on the Stardew Valley Wiki.

name: Sugar
obtainMethod: Process Beet in a Mill (yields 3 sugar), or purchase from Pierre's General Store
description: A sweet ingredient used in baking and confections.

name: Truffle Oil
obtainMethod: Process a Truffle in an Oil Maker
description: A gourmet cooking oil extracted from truffles.

name: Void Mayonnaise
obtainMethod: Process a Void Egg in a Mayonnaise Machine
description: A jet-black mayonnaise made from void chicken eggs.

name: Wheat Flour
obtainMethod: Process Wheat in a Mill, or purchase from Pierre's General Store
description: A fine, white flour milled from wheat. Used in baking.

name: Wine
obtainMethod: Process any fruit in a Keg (value = fruit base price × 3)
description: A rich fruit wine. More valuable when aged in a cask.
